## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(...)`, `fix(...)`, `chore(...)`)
- [ ] The fix lives in the engine, not in a host-side workaround
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented
